settings.question: Do you offer fleet or volume pricing on tires?
settings.answer: Yes. We work with Calgary businesses, contractors, property managers, and fleet operators to provide volume pricing on tires and services. Apply for a wholesale account online and once approved you'll receive tiered discounts based on your purchase volume — Bronze, Silver, or Gold tier. Fleet clients also get priority scheduling to minimize vehicle downtime.

settings.question: What types of commercial vehicles do you service?
settings.answer: We service light commercial vehicles including cargo vans, half-ton and three-quarter-ton trucks, full-size SUVs, and passenger vehicles used in fleet applications. We carry commercial-rated tires from Michelin, Bridgestone, Goodyear, and Hankook that are designed for the higher load ratings and increased mileage demands of fleet use.

settings.question: Can you invoice my business directly?
settings.answer: Yes. Approved wholesale accounts can be set up for net terms billing. Contact us to discuss your fleet size and requirements — we'll set up a business account that streamlines the invoicing and approvals process for your team. Multiple vehicles can be billed under a single business account.

settings.question: Do you offer priority scheduling for fleet vehicles?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Wholesale account holders get access to priority booking slots to minimize downtime. We understand that a vehicle off the road costs your business money — we work with your schedule to get your fleet vehicles in and out as quickly as possible, including early morning appointments.

settings.question: How do I apply for a wholesale account?
settings.answer: Visit our wholesale registration page and fill out a short application with your business details. Applications are typically reviewed within 1 business day. Once approved, you'll receive your wholesale discount tier and can start placing orders immediately. Existing retail customers can also be upgraded to wholesale status.

settings.heading: Commercial & Fleet Tires Calgary
settings.subheading: Keep your fleet on the road. Volume pricing, priority scheduling, and direct billing for Calgary businesses — apply for a wholesale account today.
settings.pricing_intro: We work with local businesses, contractors, property managers, and fleet operators across Calgary. Volume discounts are available on all major tire brands through our wholesale program. Bronze, Silver, and Gold tiers provide increasing discounts based on your annual purchase volume.
